ParserConfig.description: Which parser implementations to use for this document.

link_extractor.description: Parser used for the PDF outline and hyperlinks.
link_extractor.title: Link Extractor

primary.description: Name of the structural parser. ``pymupdf`` is the default and always available; ``docling`` is supported but requires installing the optional dependency.
primary.title: Primary

ParserConfig.title: ParserConfig

SourcingConfig.description:
Coordinate convention. Frozen but explicit so downstream tools can
inspect the config rather than guessing.
SourcingConfig.title: SourcingConfig

doc_id.description: Short, stable identifier — e.g. 'adb1-2022'. Prefix of every block_id and the output directory name.
doc_id.title: Doc Id

edition.description: Edition or year of the document.
edition.title: Edition
